Why it matters

Most treatments manage
symptoms, not causes.

01
Stubborn weight despite dieting
Generic plans that ignore your metabolism
02
Uncontrolled blood sugar or diabetes
Medication alone isn't enough without the right nutrition
03
PCOS, thyroid, or hormonal imbalance
Conditions that demand a clinical, root-cause lens
04
Oncology nutrition support
Specialised care during and after cancer treatment
05
Fatty liver, cholesterol, gut disorders
Lifestyle conditions that compound without targeted action
"
Most diets fail because they treat everyone the same. Your body has a specific story — and your nutrition plan must reflect it.
— Gyan Prabha, Clinical Nutritionist

How It Works

Four steps to
measurable results.

1
Free Discovery Call
Understand your health history, symptoms, and long-term goals — no judgment, no pressure.
2
Root Cause Assessment
Deep clinical analysis of your diet, lab reports, and lifestyle patterns.
3
Personalised Protocol
A science-backed nutrition plan built for your exact body — not a generic template.
4
Guided Support
Regular check-ins and adjustments until you hit your measurable health goals.
